full_text:
Zhang Cun (Churen) 張存 (處仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Cun (張存), styledChuren (處仁), was born in Nanyang commandery. Removed from office by Liu Bei for making disrepectful remarks after Pang Tong’s death. Zhang Cun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Cun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
